case_title: KIMBERLY LOVE VS. UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOVE, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-28-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOVE, KIMBERLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,766.50 FILED BY LOVE, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
